Vendor logo manager

Upload a clean vendor logo for storefront visibility, vendor profile presentation, and operational branding across the marketplace.

Vendor Profile Dashboard
Notice. Message

Create vendor profile first

A vendor profile is required before logo upload can be attached to the account.

Target Size

Logo Status

Stored Path

vendor/logo/file.png

Upload New Logo

The uploaded image will be resized and stored as the active vendor logo.

JPG or PNG only, up to 2 MB. It will be resized and stored as WebP.
Back To Profile
Remove current logo
Deleting the logo clears the vendor profile brand asset until a new image is uploaded.

Logo Quality Checklist

Use a brand asset that stays readable in storefront cards, orders, and vendor profile views.

  • Use a square source image so resizing does not crop important brand marks.
  • Keep text minimal and high contrast for small-screen visibility.
  • Replace the logo instead of uploading duplicate variants with the same brand purpose.
